description_long: This stuffed toy resembles a small humanoid figure crafted from a textured, brown, knitted fabric, giving it a hand-sewn appearance. Its head is large and rounded, with visible white stitching along the seams, and two prominent black button-like eyes. The body is proportionally smaller, with short arms and legs, each featuring additional stitched details and a slightly chunky, plush form. A metallic zipper runs vertically down the front of the torso, adding a playful, mechanical accent to the otherwise soft design. The toy's limbs are slightly bent, and the hands are mitten-shaped, lacking individual fingers. The overall look is whimsical and endearing, reminiscent of a handmade ragdoll or a character from a children's video game.
description: A brown, knitted humanoid stuffed toy with button eyes, stitched seams, and a zipper down its front, evoking a handmade ragdoll style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large head with button eyes, stitched seams, and a central zipper on the torso.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded head, visible side stitching, and the profile of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head and body, with stitching details and no facial features or zipper visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side stitching and the profile of the limbs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with large black button eyes and no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a simple, calm appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs apart, head facing forward.
